1.full: The sender created this waybill but has not yet handed it over for shipment.

4.full: Shipment is in city XXXX (status for inter-regional shipments)

5.full: Shipment is heading to city YYYY

6.full: Shipment is in city YYYY, estimated delivery to BRANCH-XXX dd-mm. Please wait for an additional arrival notification

8.full: Arrived at branch (loaded into parcel locker)

10.full: Shipment received on %DateReceived%. Within 24 hours you will receive an SMS about money transfer availability at Nova Poshta branch cashier

11.full: Shipment received on %DateReceived%. Money transfer has been issued to the recipient

12.full: Nova Poshta is processing your shipment

41.full: Shipment is in city XXXX (status for Local Standard and Local Express services, delivery within the city)

102.full: Refusal to receive (sender created a return request)

111.full: Delivery attempt failed because recipient was unavailable at address or by phone
